channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran’s Infowar: Lego, AI and ever tightening control
item.description: The tools and techniques behind Iran’s push in the battle of narratives.

item.title: Top Iranian and Pakistani officials meet in Islamabad
item.description: Iran’s FM Abbas Araghchi is in Islamabad for talks with Pakistani officials, as US envoys are also set to arrive.

item.title: Overnight Russian attacks on Ukraine kill five, injure 30
item.description: Russia launched more than 600 drones and 47 missiles as it targeted eight regions in Dnipro, authorities say.

item.title: US sanctions China’s ‘teapot’ refinery for buying Iranian oil
item.description: The Hengli refinery has generated hundreds of millions of dollars for Iran's military, says US Treasury.

item.title: Capture of ships by US, Iran violates international law, shipping body says
item.description: US and Iran should immediately release crews of captured vessels, says International Chamber of Shipping director.

item.title: What’s at stake for Iran and the US in Islamabad?
item.description: Iran’s foreign minister is in Islamabad, with US envoys also on the way.

item.title: Israel escalates attacks in Gaza, killing 12 people
item.description: Israeli forces have killed 12 Palestinians, including six police officers, in multiple attacks across Gaza.

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 57 as Trump dispatches negotiating team?
item.description: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan, as Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran’s FM in Islamabad; US says envoys to travel for talks
item.description: Israeli air strikes, tank shelling in Gaza killed at least 12 Palestinians, including six police officers.

item.title: US sending envoys to Pakistan, raising hopes of talks with Iran’s Araghchi
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrives in Islamabad, but Tehran yet to commit to more talks with US delegation.
